steps.title: Read the table values
steps.content: The table shows h(0) = 17, h(1) = 18, and h(2) = 20. All choices have the form $h(x) = 2^x + c$ for different constants. Test the simplest input, x = 0, where $2^0 = 1$ reduces each choice to $1 + c$.

steps.title: Backsolve using x = 0
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice B ($h(x) = 2^x + 15$): $h(0) = 1 + 15 = 16 \neq 17$. Fails. Testing choice A ($h(x) = 2^x + 16$): $h(0) = 1 + 16 = 17$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
